bits.premise: Performing high turns weed into a live warning.
Phone choice can outrank race as social judgment.
Knowing how to swim reads as white.
An ankle monitor makes house arrest visible.

lines.text: Oh, my God.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I am high as alien pussy right now.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Don't smoke weed before you do this.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm telling you, it's not a good thing.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Anyway, my name is Brandon.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Yeah, I'm a black guy with a white name, so, I mean.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Believe it or not, I get judged more about what kind of phone I have
lines.label: setup

lines.text: more than being black these days.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Believe that.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: It's like, "Oh, you got an Android?"
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "Oh, this ugly nigga got an Android.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I can't take it."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Why y'all judge people off of their phones, man?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: 'Cause I got an iPhone, I'm not cool.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: 'Cause I don't have an iPhone, I'm not cool.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Maybe? Alright, fuck y'all.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: That is--anyway, yep, I got another white name.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Um, uh, white thing about me, uh, I could swim.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: - I'm like that dude on House of Rest back there.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: That just left a stage.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: He was actually on House of Rest.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I saw that ankle monitor and shit.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Thank you, I'm Brandon.
lines.label: fluff
